plugins.name: secret-guard
plugins.description: Blocks reading secret files (.env, *.pem, *.key, credentials), dumping environment variables, and warns on writing to credential paths

plugins.name: wt-workflow
plugins.description: Skill for the wt git worktree CLI — covers installation, the core workflow (wt switch, wt update, wt remove, wt prune, wt review, wt -w), and .worktreekeep config

plugins.name: conventional-commits
plugins.description: Enforces Conventional Commits v1.0.0 formatting for all git commit messages — structured types, scopes, breaking change notation, and no AI attribution footers

plugins.name: add-plugin
plugins.description: Scaffolds and registers a new plugin in the claude-kit personal marketplace
